title: Google's TurboQuant: The Algorithm That Could End the AI Memory Crisis
author: Howard
excerpt: Google unveils TurboQuant, an AI memory compression algorithm that reduces LLM working memory requirements by 6x without sacrificing accuracy, potentially solving the global RAM shortage.

image_prompts.hero: Futuristic Google data center with glowing neural network compression visualization, memory chips transforming into compact efficient forms, TurboQuant algorithm visualization, blue and green tech lighting
image_prompts.inline: Abstract visualization of memory compression, RAM chips folding into smaller compact forms like origami, data streams compressing, efficiency metrics glowing
